flow_points: India started strongly, scoring 52/1 in the Powerplay at an 8.67 run rate.
Ishan Kishan anchored India's innings with a crucial 77(40), contributing 44.0% of the total runs.
Saim Ayub delivered a crucial spell for Pakistan, taking 3 wickets for 25 runs.
Pakistan's chase began poorly, losing 4 wickets for just 38 runs in their Powerplay.
HH Pandya delivered a crucial spell for India, taking 2 wickets for 16 runs at an outstanding economy of 5.33.
CV Varun also contributed with a crucial spell, taking 2 wickets for 17 runs.
Kuldeep Yadav bowled an outstanding and economical spell (economy 5.0) that further contained Pakistan.
Pakistan struggled under extreme chase pressure (Index: 89.0), leading to a late-innings collapse.
